candidate_mir:
task relay1_on_wait_read_water {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(water_sensor)
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 500ms
  read water_sensor
  halt
}

task relay1_off_wait_read_water {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(water_sensor)
  set relay1 = 0
  wait 500ms
  read water_sensor
  halt
}

task relay2_on_wait_read_temperature {
  require cap(relay2)
  require cap(temperature_sensor)
  set relay2 = 1
  wait 500ms
  read temperature_sensor
  halt
}

task relay2_off_wait_read_humidity {
  require cap(relay2)
  require cap(humidity_sensor)
  set relay2 = 0
  wait 500ms
  read humidity_sensor
  halt
}

task read_relay1_then_water {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(water_sensor)
  read relay1
  read water_sensor
  halt
}

task read_relay2_then_temperature {
  require cap(relay2)
  require cap(temperature_sensor)
  read relay2
  read temperature_sensor
  halt
}

task read_water_then_humidity {
  require cap(water_sensor)
  require cap(humidity_sensor)
  read water_sensor
  read humidity_sensor
  halt
}

task relay1_pulse {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 50ms
  set relay1 = 0
  halt
}
